name: Athan Alert
description: Shows in-game notifications at Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha prayer times.

country.name: Country
country.description: Country used when fetching prayer times from Aladhan API.

city.name: City
city.description: City used when fetching prayer times from Aladhan API.

calculation-method.name: Calculation Method
calculation-method.description: Calculation method for prayer times (1-22). Default is 18.

auto-pause-on-prayer.name: Auto Pause On Prayer
auto-pause-on-prayer.description: Automatically pause the level when prayer time starts.

enable-adhan-audio.name: Enable Adhan Audio
enable-adhan-audio.description: Play the adhan sound when it's prayer time.

remind-one-minute-before.name: 1 Minute Reminder
remind-one-minute-before.description: Show a reminder notification 1 minute before each prayer time.

adhan-mp3.name: Adhan MP3
adhan-mp3.description: MP3 played on prayer alert. Leave as default to use bundled adhan.

geoip-actions.name: Location Detection
geoip-actions.description: Detect location by GeoIP and auto-fill Country/City. Also clears and re-downloads prayer times for the new location.

refetch-actions.name: Prayer Times Cache
refetch-actions.description: Manually clear the cached prayer times and re-download fresh data from Aladhan.
